name: Dual-chamber pacemaker longevity: 15.3 years
description: A benchmark for device longevity in the Astra MRI SureScan dual-chamber pacemaker, rated at 15.3 years based on optimized hardware circuitry and reduced current drain. This metric is contingent on typical usage and device settings, and may vary with patient-specific pacing requirements, serving as a guide for device replacement planning.
